title: SCBE zero-cost local 0.5B preflight profile
description: Local/Colab-safe dataset preflight profile for small 0.5B coding-agent experiments. This profile exists so zero-cost training checks validate concrete files before any notebook or remote lane is launched.
notes: This is a preflight contract, not a promoted model profile.
Use explicit GeoSeal coding profiles for HF Jobs dispatch.
Run npm run training:geoshell-pairs before preflighting the generated GeoShell pair-agent dataset profile.
